---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
#037A_binonial.R


#### roll size, what is cummulative mean?
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
# 1/n converges slowly!
size <- 100000
t <- tibble(x=sample(x=c(1,0),size=size, replace = TRUE),
			run_avg = dplyr::cummean(x)
			) %>% 
	mutate(line = 1:size)

t$run_avg %>% tail()
t %>% ggplot(aes(x=line, y=run_avg)) +
	geom_point()
	
```
